// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly;

/// <summary>
/// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
/// </summary>
public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all default services.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.TestHandler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.TestHandler<>));
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.TestHandlerTestEntity, global::TestNamespace.TestHandlerTestEntity>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.TestHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestEntity>, global::TestNamespace.TestHandlerTestEntity>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.ViewModel>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
        {
            var p0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.TestHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestEntity>>();
            var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.ViewModel(p0);
            return s0;
        });

        return services;
    }
}
